title: Annandale murder case back in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Sonwabile Mbambo’s (39) bail application is still ongoing. He is accused of murdering Heleen Annandale (62).","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Sonwabile Mbambo’s (39) bail application is still ongoing. He is accused of murdering Heleen Annandale (62)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mbambo was arrested less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body had been discovered in her Mossel Bay flat with a wound to the neck on Monday 1 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also faces a charge of theft, as Annandale’s car was missing and later found abandoned in KwaNonqaba.","html":"He also faces a charge of theft, as Annandale’s car was missing and later found abandoned in KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His next court appearance is scheduled for Thursday 6 November, where his bail application will continue. He remains in police custody.","html":"His next court appearance is scheduled for Thursday 6 November, where his bail application will continue. He remains in police custody."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld","Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case","Suspect in Mossel Bay flat murder makes first appearance in court","Annandale murder suspect's case postponed again"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Annandale murder case back in court
